title: ocotea moschata
intro: Ocotea moschata, also known as the tree moss or Ocotea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the production of cortisol, a hormone associated with stress. The health benefits of Ocotea moschata include reducing anxiety and stress levels, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Ocotea moschata is commonly prepared as an essential oil or capsule, and it can also be consumed as a tea or added to herbal supplements.
